title: Web Development
excerpt: Fast, accessible, server-rendered web platforms engineered for Core Web Vitals, SEO, and scale.

seo.title: Web Development Services | Baalvion
seo.description: Baalvion builds high-performance, server-rendered web platforms engineered for Core Web Vitals, accessibility, SEO, and scale. Explore our process and stack.

benefits: Fast first paint and strong Core Web Vitals
Built to scale to high traffic

process.desc: Audience, goals, and the metrics that matter (CWV, conversion, SEO).
Intentional UI with a real design system, not a template.

blocks.text: A web platform is often the first thing a customer experiences — and the slowest part of most stacks. Baalvion builds web platforms that are fast, accessible, and engineered for search. We default to server rendering for clean indexability and resilience, and we treat performance as a budget, not an afterthought. This very site is built the way we build for clients.

items: **Speed:** strong Core Web Vitals through server rendering, caching, and disciplined bundles.
**Discoverability:** SSR/SSG/ISR and structured data for SEO — see [web performance optimization](/news/tech/web-performance-optimization).
**Accessibility:** WCAG-aligned semantics and keyboard support by default.
**Scale:** edge caching and incremental rendering for high traffic.

blocks.text: We define the metrics that matter, design an intentional interface with a real design system, build it server-rendered and instrumented, then measure with Lighthouse and real-user data and iterate. Performance and accessibility are acceptance criteria, not nice-to-haves.

Next.js and React with TypeScript, Tailwind for a disciplined design system, edge/CDN delivery, and incremental static regeneration for content that stays fresh without rebuilds. The stack choice always follows the goals — see [choosing the right technology stack](/news/tech/choosing-the-right-technology-stack).

We run high-traffic, content-rich web properties across our ecosystem, so we know what breaks at scale and how to avoid it. See the storefront work in [launching a verified luxury commerce marketplace](/case-studies/luxury-commerce-marketplace), and pair this with [cloud solutions](/services/cloud-solutions) and [technology consulting](/services/technology-consulting).

faqs.a: SSR gives fast first paint, clean indexability for SEO, and resilience. Combined with static generation and ISR, you get speed and freshness without rebuilds.

faqs.q: How do you keep sites fast as they grow?
faqs.a: Performance budgets, edge caching, code splitting, and real-user monitoring — covered in [web performance optimization](/news/tech/web-performance-optimization).
Yes. WCAG-aligned semantics, keyboard navigation, and contrast are built in by default, not added later.
We favour Next.js and React with TypeScript, but choose based on your team and goals.
